prompt: Photorealistic studio portrait of a 33-year-old woman, French, medium skin, auburn long straight hair. Working as Agent Recrutement / RH in a modern Paris office. Empathetic warm smile. Wearing rust-orange silk blouse, pearl earrings. Warm natural window light (soft overhead key + gentle fill), soft beige #ede3d2 backdrop, shallow depth of field, 85mm f/1.8, skin texture preserved (pores, fine lines, natural freckles if appropriate). Editorial magazine quality. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Vertical 9:16 composition, subject centered, upper-body framing.
